---
title: "AgentGhost.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\AgentGhost.tsx"
loc: 67
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.13
style_score: 4.08
intel_score: 6.18
overall_score: 5.84
---

## Intent
The `AgentGhost.tsx` module implements the 3D visualization of autonomous agents within the neural graph. It renders agents as dynamic 'Ghosts' that move between nodes based on real-time telemetry, providing a visual representation of active file mutations and mission traces.

## Interaction Protocol
This component is used within the `NeuralGraph` scene. It receives agent position and path data, automatically animating the ghost's movement to reflect physical activity in the repository.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [Float](file://@react-three/drei)

### Exports
- `AgentGhost`
- `AgentGhost`
- `points`
- `curve`
- `arcedPoints`
- `i`
- `start`
- `end`
- `mid`
- `dist`
- `activeNode`
